name: dispatch
description: Grand Central Dispatch (libdispatch) bindings — serial/concurrent queues, groups, async/sync dispatch
platform_notes: Requires clang with -fblocks. macOS: libdispatch is part of libSystem (no install needed). Non-Apple: dispatch.c compiles in stub mode via #ifdef __APPLE__ — calls return early without performing real concurrency. To get real GCD on Linux, build swift-corelibs-libdispatch from source; Ubuntu/Debian/Fedora do not package it as of 2026.
